title: ABOUT REGRESSION THERAPY METHOD
subtitle: Regression therapy is a therapeutic approach that allows you to return to past life events to heal psychological traumas and solve current problems.
description: Regression hypnosis is a therapy method that allows the subject to enter a deep state of relaxation and subconscious perception. In this state, the regression therapist helps the person recall and process events from the past that may have an impact on their current state or behavior.

explorationAreas.1: traumatic situations or even moments from past lives (used to solve all requests, universally)
explorationAreas.2: life between lives (you can see contracts with kindred souls who incarnate as your loved ones or even enemies, often finding understanding in relationships with people)
explorationAreas.3: the world of angels (a space of complete processing, raising vibrations, awareness)
explorationAreas.4: ancestral space (for complex requests, working through ancestral scenarios that negatively affect you)
explorationAreas.5: extraterrestrial incarnations (where, on which planets and when your soul lived before coming to Earth, most often in these spaces everything falls into place – purpose, soul tasks and other important requests)
explorationAreas.6: the future – your or the next life of the soul

paragraphs.0: The goal of regression hypnosis is to identify and resolve hidden psychological blocks that prevent a person from achieving harmony in life. During the session, the regression therapist helps the patient not only review these events but also rethink them, which allows for emotional healing and stress reduction.
paragraphs.1: This technique is suitable for people who seek to better understand themselves, free themselves from negative experiences, and improve their quality of life. Regression hypnosis is a safe and comfortable process during which the client always maintains control over their sensations.
paragraphs.2: If you are interested in deeper self-knowledge and emotional healing, regression hypnosis can be the first step towards a new quality of life.

0.title: Access to the Subconscious
0.description: Regression therapy allows access to hidden memories and subconscious blocks.

1.title: Emotional Healing
1.description: Release from emotional traumas of the past and transformation of negative behavior patterns.

2.title: Self-Knowledge
2.description: Deep understanding of one's personality, motives, and life goals through exploring the past.

3.title: Potential Revelation
3.description: Identification and activation of hidden talents, abilities, and personal resources.

paragraphs.0: During a regression therapy session, you enter an altered state of consciousness similar to deep relaxation. In this state, you can access memories and information that are usually unavailable in a normal state of consciousness.
paragraphs.1: The therapist accompanies you on this journey, helping to explore significant events, understand their impact on your present life, and transform negative experiences into resourceful experiences.
